hero.title: IoT Platform
hero.subtitle: Connect everything, power intelligence
hero.description: Build an enterprise-grade IoT platform with full device lifecycle management to accelerate digital transformation.

overview.title: What is an IoT Platform?
overview.p1: An IoT platform bridges physical devices and the digital world. Our enterprise platform unifies device management, data ingestion, protocol adaptation, analytics, and app development to rapidly build and deploy IoT solutions.
overview.p2: It supports massive device connectivity with powerful stream processing and a flexible dev environment across smart cities, industrial IoT, smart homes, and connected vehicles. Edge–cloud collaboration ensures high availability, scalability, and security.

ingress.title: Device Ingress
ingress.intro: Multi-protocol, multi-method onboarding for stable, large-scale device access.

stream.title: Data Processing
stream.intro: High-throughput, low-latency stream processing for real-time analytics.

enablement.title: Application Enablement
enablement.intro: Standardized APIs/SDKs to accelerate integration and app development.

items.title: Device Management
items.desc: End-to-end lifecycle management from registration to maintenance.

items.title: Security
items.desc: End-to-end encryption, device identity, and privacy protection aligned with global standards.

items.title: Analytics
items.desc: Built-in engine for real-time monitoring, historical analysis, and forecasting.

items.title: Rule Engine
items.desc: Flexible rules to automate alerts, actuation, and business triggers.

items.title: Edge–Cloud Collaboration
items.desc: Lower latency and bandwidth costs with improved responsiveness.

items.title: OTA Updates
items.desc: Remote firmware upgrades with batch, staged rollout, and rollback.

cards.title: Smart City
cards.desc: Smart lighting, environmental monitoring, smart parking, waste, public safety

cards.title: Industrial IoT
cards.desc: Equipment monitoring, predictive maintenance, production data, energy management, traceability

cards.title: Smart Home
cards.desc: Appliance control, security, climate, energy, scenes

cards.title: Connected Vehicles
cards.desc: Location tracking, remote diagnostics, driving behavior, dispatching, fleet

cards.title: Smart Agriculture
cards.desc: Env monitoring, precise irrigation, pest alerts, agri-machinery, provenance

cards.title: Energy Management
cards.desc: Smart meters, consumption, load forecasting, demand response, distributed energy

items.title: Massive scale & low latency
items.desc: Distributed architecture supports tens of millions online; push latency < 100 ms.

items.title: Multi-protocol compatibility
items.desc: MQTT / CoAP / LwM2M / Modbus and 50+ others to reduce integration costs.

items.title: Private deployment
items.desc: Public/private/hybrid options to meet security and compliance requirements.

items.title: Open ecosystem
items.desc: Comprehensive APIs/SDKs for easy integration with third-party systems.

cta.title: Start your IoT journey
cta.sub: Talk to us for a tailored enterprise IoT platform solution.
